name: Self-Frosting Anise Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder together.
2. Beat eggs and sugar for 30 minutes.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture and beat for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Add anise seed to the dough.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased and floured cookie sheet.
6. Allow cookies to dry overnight.
7. Bake at 325 degrees F for 12 minutes.
